# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    app: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-container
        image: your-web-app-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthcheck
            port: 80
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthcheck
            port: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: web
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80
  type: LoadBalancer
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached-container
        image: memcached:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
  clusterIP: None
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-worker-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    app: background-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-worker
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: background-worker-container
        image: your-background-worker-image:latest
        env:
          - name: MEMCACHED_SERVICE_NAME
            value: memcached-service/TCP/11211
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthcheck
            port: 80
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthcheck
            port: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: background-worker-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: background-worker
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 9000
      targetPort: 80
